evidence_summary: Application worker crossed into shell and hidden PowerShell execution
Unsigned DLL written by certutil in the suspicious process chain
PowerShell and certutil retrieved the staged DLL from a newly observed external destination
Interactive administrator collected health and event-log data after the alert
Approved service-context PowerShell launched signed MSI deployment
Scheduled task created expected log archive and contacted internal log service
Suspicious source 203.0.113.77 probed and then posted to diagnostics immediately before process execution
Service-context PowerShell wrote monitoring counters and contacted internal monitoring collector
Peer edge server recycled an app pool through approved maintenance ancestry
Backup service copied web config over SMB using approved backup context
Deployment tool used cmd.exe, but ancestry and identity differ from IIS-spawned shell
